text: this is a female 41 years of age operated for left lobectomy of thyroid and here we can see the major structures this is the recurrent laryngeal nerve which was separated from middle thyroid artery and the thyroid gland this is the trachea and here we can see the superior laryngeal nerve
This is the superior laryngeal nerve and beneath is the pulsation can be felt of internal carotid artery along with it is internal jugular vein.
